images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model with a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, exuding a lazy and sluggish mood while sitting on a plush sofa by a massive floor-to-ceiling window. She is draped in an unbuttoned beige trench coat worn as a cover-up over a skimpy, form-fitting sunset-themed bikini that accentuates her slim waist and ample chest, the fabric texture contrasting sharply with the smooth silk of the coat. Her straight black silky hair cascades messily over her shoulders, framing her cute yet seductive face as she bites her lip slightly, her large expressive eyes locking onto the lens with an intimate gaze. The background is a blurred, high-contrast urban twilight, illuminated by a bright, clear moonlight glow that casts sharp, professional highlights on her flawless skin texture, visible pores, and faint vellus hair. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination, high contrast and sharp color grade.8k photo, Large breasts
